title.km: ទេវតាសង្រ្គោះលោក

description.en: Just Another Margin (2014) is a Chinese comedy film directed by Jeffrey Lau. The story focuses on celestial beings who descend to Earth and affect human lives in strange and hilarious ways.
description.km: Just Another Margin (2014) ជាខ្សែភាពយន្តកំប្លែងចិនដែលដឹកនាំដោយ Jeffrey Lau។ រឿងផ្តោតលើសត្វសេឡេស្ទាល (celestial beings) ដែលចុះមកផែនដី ហើយប៉ះពាល់ដល់ជីវិតមនុស្សតាមវិធីចម្លែក និងគួរឱ្យអស់សំណើច។
